name: Mom's Sour Cream Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the egg and beat well. Mix in the sour cream.
3. Gradually add the sifted flour, baking soda, and salt to the mixture. Blend until just combined.
4. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
5. Dip the bottom of a small glass into water, then sprinkle with sugar before pressing down on each dropped piece of dough.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 12 to 16 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
